notes: Recognisably the same Loligo with correct mantle/fin/tentacle arrangement, but edges read as a noisy photo-trace and the arms lack the disciplined sucker rings of an FAO plate.
specific_issues: jittery edge-traced outline rather than clean single-weight ink
no clear ring-shaped suckers along arms or tentacular clubs
stipple pattern reads as edge-trace speckle rather than deliberate chromatophore field
tentacular club tips lack the characteristic suckered paddle detail
small breaks/dropouts in the mantle outline near the head
